ingestion_pipeline.principle: Never call live APIs from dashboard pages. Ingest first, store locally, then query DuckDB.

phase_1_manual_csv.step: Create sample CSV files for agencies, vendors, vehicles, awards, opportunities, and capture_notes.
Run scripts/build_db.py to load CSVs into DuckDB.

phase_2_usaspending.step: Use USAspending.gov API v2 to retrieve award/spending data for target agencies and capability keywords.
Persist raw responses to data/raw/usaspending/ as JSON or Parquet.
Append/update DuckDB tables during scheduled refresh.

phase_2_sam.step: Use SAM.gov Opportunities API with SAM_API_KEY environment variable.
Run scoring after ingest, not inside dashboard page load.

scheduling_options.windows: Use Windows Task Scheduler to run python scripts/refresh_all.py daily or weekly.
scheduling_options.manual: Provide Makefile or simple commands for manual refresh.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Refresh jobs can be run without launching Streamlit.
Dashboard remains fast because it queries local DuckDB only.
Missing API key does not prevent sample dashboard from running.
